text:
is a 1st year Attack Junior High School student.

Appearance

Milieus has ash blond hair and blue-gray eyes. He wears the standard boys uniform of the school.

Story

Milieus arrives at Attack Junior High School and is in class 1-4. He attends the first-year entrance ceremony, and later flees when Titans invade the area.

Milieus participates in the school's dodgeball tournament on Annie's team.

Following a challenge by the upperclassmen, Milieus participates in the school's Sports Day games, teaming up with Nack and Daz.

In the election for a new student council president, Milieus is present for the candidates' final speeches, and angrily reacts to Rico's presidential plans of forcing all students to clean the school on breaks, after school, and on non-school days.

In the school's 104th festival, Milieus, along with Daz, help operating the stage lights of a Snow White play.

When teachers get in the way of Eren trying to head to the Titans' building to retrieve his chee-burgs, Milieus, along with his classmates stand up for him and come between them. He later watches Ilse Langnar's broadcast of Eren and the others venturing into the principal's office, and cheers once Eren manages to retrieve a chee-burg.
